title: [scheme] define lat?
src: (defun lat? (l) (cond ((null? l) t) ((atom? (car l)) (lat? (cdr l))) (t nil)))

title: [scheme] define eval (metacircular)
src: (define eval (lambda (e a) (cond ((eq? (car e) (quote quote)) (car (cdr e))) ((eq? (car e) (quote car)) (car (eval (car (cdr e)) a))) ((eq? (car e) (quote cdr)) (cdr (eval (car (cdr e)) a))) ((eq? (car e) (quote cons)) (cons (eval (car (cdr e)) a) (eval (car (cdr (cdr e))) a))) (t (quote unknown)))))
